{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Obsidian Calendar
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|The [[dragon]] was imprisoned in Year 780 of the [[Obsidian Calendar]].<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c13">''Dreadgod'', chapter 13</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
